archimate:DataObject.name: ESCO
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: The ESCO classification identifies and categorises skills, competences, and occupations relevant for the EU labour market and education and training. It systematically shows the relationships between the different concepts.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: European Commission
Source: https://esco.ec.europa.eu/en
LOST view: SV-Agnostic Reference Data
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ESCODataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ESCODataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/ReferenceData

properties.value: The ESCO classification identifies and categorises skills, competences, and occupations relevant for the EU labour market and education and training. It systematically shows the relationships between the different concepts.
